vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was obsessed with building intricate models out of Lego.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng không giới hạn
vocab.example: We used to play role-playing games in the backyard, fueled by our unbridled imagination.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi ngoài trời
vocab.example: I was quite fond of various outdoor pursuits, especially climbing trees and exploring the local park.
I often reminisce about the long summer afternoons we spent flying kites by the river.

vocab.meaning: kì lạ, quái lạ nhưng theo cách tích cực/ngẫu hứng
vocab.example: My favorite childhood activity was creating whimsical drawings of mythical creatures.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi truy tìm báu vật
vocab.example: My parents would often organize a scavenger hunt around the house to keep us entertained for hours.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/thúc đẩy sự sáng tạo
vocab.example: Engaging in arts and crafts was a staple of my childhood as it helped foster creativity.

vocab.meaning: niềm hạnh phúc vô tư lự
vocab.example: Playing hide-and-seek with the neighborhood kids provided a sense of carefree bliss that is hard to find as an adult.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển ngồi một chỗ (ít vận động)
vocab.example: While I loved running around, I also enjoyed sedentary pastimes like reading adventure novels.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp thể chất/vận động
vocab.example: Learning to ride a bicycle was a challenging activity that significantly improved my physical coordination.
